fields.label: Source Type
fields.options:
User
Role
Requester Manager
Department Manager
Reference Department Head
Reference User Field
Reference Employee Manager
fields.description: How this participant resolves. Requester Manager = Employee.reports_to; Department Manager = Department.department_head; Reference Department Head = department_head of the Department named by 'department_field' on the business record; Reference User Field = the User named by 'reference_field' on the business record; Reference Employee Manager = the direct manager (reports_to) of the Employee identified by the email/user in 'reference_field' on the business record.

fields.label: Department Field
fields.description: Fieldname on the business DocType holding the owner Department (e.g. owner_department).

fields.label: Reference Field
fields.description: Fieldname on the business DocType holding the approver User (Reference User Field) or the resigning/target Employee's email/user (Reference Employee Manager).

fields.label: Fallback User
fields.description: Optional. Config-seeded fallback approver used ONLY when this row's primary source resolves to nobody (e.g. no Employee.reports_to). Must be an active System User. Never a second always-on approver.
